_comment: FRAMEWORK TEST PROSPECT for HVAC trade expansion (Phase 1 validation). Verified data sourced from Outscraper's Google Business Profile snapshot (place_id ChIJPd9IqQQscogRsKGhnyOPlhg, verified=TRUE, business_status=OPERATIONAL). Unknown fields left null intentionally to exercise the new 07 HVAC defaults end-to-end -- services:[] forces the HVAC canonical catalog to fire, service_radius:null forces the 25-mile default, no owner_first_name forces the cold-open salutation path. Trade Mismatch warning should NOT fire (hvac is in SKILL.md's supported list after the downstream cleanups). Olney Heating IL is distinct from olneyheatingandairconditioning.com (Maryland business, different entity).
